update.sql: alter table ContactType drop column nonUnique;
alter table Address drop foreign key FK1ED033D4C0329886;
alter table Address drop column contactType;
alter table Email drop foreign key FK3FF5B7CC0329886;
alter table Email drop column contactType;
alter table PhoneNumber drop foreign key FK1C4E6237C0329886;
alter table PhoneNumber drop column contactType;
